description_long: This object is a short sword with a broad, straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic and dark gray, suggesting it is forged from steel or iron. The hilt features a prominent, rectangular crossguard in a gold color, providing hand protection and visual contrast to the blade. The handle is straight and cylindrical, also gold in color, with a faceted pommel that appears to have a pinkish accent, possibly imitating a gemstone or decorative cap. The overall design is simple yet functional, with minimal ornamentation aside from the colored pommel. This sword would be suitable for display, ceremonial use, or as a prop in an urban-themed scenario.
description: A short, broad-bladed sword with a gold crossguard and handle, featuring a pink-accented pommel. The blade is straight, double-edged, and metallic gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, pointed blade and the full width of the gold crossguard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thinness of the blade and the straight, cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and the rectangular crossguard, with the pommel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the blade's length and the handle's shape.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, gold-colored with faceted pommel and pink accent
